strengths: 10+ years full-stack experience across TypeScript/Node.js, React, and multiple backend languages
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work including MCP code generators aligns with required AI agent skill
Strong engineering craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, plus teaching/workshop background
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience listed in the primary stack
Limited demonstrated Kotlin experience; Java exposure is older (robotic arms era)
Cloud experience skews AWS/Kubernetes; no clear GCP/Azure depth and Vitest/Playwright not explicitly named
response.justification: The candidate is a seasoned full-stack engineer with well over the required 6 years, recent hands-on work in TypeScript/Node.js and React, and directly relevant AI-agent and MCP tooling experience matching the role's emerging focus. Architecture, testing discipline, and polyglot breadth (including Java) fit the stack well, though Nest.js is not explicitly cited and Kotlin exposure appears limited, which would be the main gaps to probe.
